title: UnderControl Agent CLI
description: Schema for UnderControl Agent CLI entities. Agent CLIs define the launch commands used by agents in workspace sessions (e.g., claude, aider, codex).

id.description: Agent CLI UUID. Present = existing (update). Absent = new (create).

name.description: Slug name: lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens. Unique per owner. Used to reference the CLI config (e.g., 'claude', 'aider').

command.description: The shell command to launch the agent process (e.g., 'claude --dangerously-skip-permissions').

builtin.description: True for system agent CLIs. Built-in CLIs cannot be deleted.
